picks.title: 420 in the Park featuring The Legendary Wailers & Baby Bash
picks.why: 420 in the Park brings The Legendary Wailers and Baby Bash to Plaza de Cesar Chavez for a rare outdoor music festival.

picks.title: Palo Alto Earth Day Festival
picks.why: Palo Alto Earth Day Festival offers free family fun celebrating sustainability with local vendors and interactive activities.

picks.title: Viva CalleSJ: East Side Quest
picks.venue: White Road and Alum Rock Avenue
picks.why: Viva CalleSJ closes miles of East San José streets for walking, biking, and skating—a vibrant community celebration you can't do any other weekend.
